rw [riemannZeta.Sigma, ε₂]
  have hx : 0 < x := by sorry
  gcongr
  
  -- Split the sum into parts γ ≤ H₀ and γ > H₀
  have split_sum : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 σ₁) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) =
      riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 σ₁) (Set.Ioc 0 I.H₀) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) +
      riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 σ₁) (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) := by sorry

  rw [split_sum]

  -- Bound the first part (γ ≤ H₀)
  -- By RH (I.hH₀), re(ρ) = 1/2 for γ ≤ H₀. Thus term is x^(-1/2) / ρ.im.
  have bound_low : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 σ₁) (Set.Ioc 0 I.H₀) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) ≤
      x^(-0.5:ℝ) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioc 0 I.H₀) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by sorry

  -- Bound the second part (γ > H₀)
  -- Since re(ρ) < σ₁, x^(re(ρ)-1) ≤ x^(σ₁-1) (assuming x ≥ 1).
  have bound_high : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico 0 σ₁) (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) ≤
      x^(σ₁ - 1) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by sorry

  -- Apply the bounds
  calc
    _ ≤ x^(-0.5:ℝ) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioc 0 I.H₀) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) +
        x^(σ₁ - 1) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by
        gcongr; exact bound_low; exact bound_high
    _ = x^(-0.5:ℝ) * (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioc 0 I.H₀) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) +
        riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im)) +
        (x^(σ₁ - 1) - x^(-0.5:ℝ)) * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by ring
    _ ≤ x^(-0.5:ℝ) * (I.S₀ + I.B₁ I.T₀ T) + (x^(σ₁ - 1) - x^(-0.5:ℝ)) * I.B₁ I.H₀ T := by
        -- Use corollary_2_3 for the total sum and lemma_2_1 for the tail sum
        have h_total : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) ≤ I.S₀ + I.B₁ I.T₀ T := by
           have := corollary_2_3 I (by linarith); linarith
        have h_tail : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) ≤ I.B₁ I.H₀ T := by sorry
        have h_coeff : 0 ≤ x^(σ₁ - 1) - x^(-0.5:ℝ) := by sorry
        have h_merge : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioc 0 I.H₀) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) +
                       riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo I.H₀ T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) =
                       riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := by sorry
        rw [h_merge]
        gcongr
